name: Chilled Orange Marmalade Cream Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix gelatin in boiling water and stir until completely dissolved. Set aside to cool.
2. In a food processor, combine ground graham crackers and sugar. Add 1 1/2 tablespoons light cream cheese and process.
3. Spray a 9-inch pie plate with non-stick cooking spray. Pour the crust mixture into the pie plate and press gently to form the crust. Chill.
4. In the same food processor, combine all filling ingredients except marmalade. Process until smooth.
5. Add the gelatin-water mixture and marmalade to the processed filling. Mix gently.
6. Carefully pour the filling into the chilled crust. Chill the pie for 3-4 hours before serving.
